text.title: Quality Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the project have measurable quality attributes + DoD?

conclusion.verdict: Define measurable quality first or skip

branch.when: measurable == true AND thresholds_defined == true AND gate_implemented == false
measurable == true AND thresholds_defined == true AND gate_implemented == true

conclusion.verdict: Wire defect triage with severity + priority

example.trace: measurable=true → thresholds_defined=true → gate_implemented=true → triage flow active.
